title: Light Meal
body:
# Light Meal

do you hate having to carry torches AND food?

do you want to go vegan but are having a hard time finding delicious meat alternatives?

do you think the world would be better if all sources of light were snuffed out to feed your ravenous hunger?

then this mod is for you!

light meal is a very simple mod that lets you eat light sources (instead of food). the more light the source puts out, the more filling it will be!
(you can still drink potions and milk, though).

as the name suggests, light sources are not very filling and as such do not take a long time to eat.
